{{Event Header|StS2_Doll Room.png}} {{E|Doll Room|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Hive}}. The relic pool is: * {{R|Bing Bong||2}} * {{R|Daughter of the Wind||2}} * {{R|Mr. Struggles||2}} == Options == {{Frame|Pick at Random}} {{TS|positive||Obtain a random Doll Relic}}
{{Frame|Take Some Time}} {{TS|negative||Lose 5 HP}}. {{TS|positive||Choose {{TS|blue||1}} of {{TS|blue||2}} Doll Relics}}
{{Frame|Examine Each and Make the Best Choice}} {{TS|negative||Lose 15 HP}}. {{TS|positive||Choose {{TS|blue||1}} of {{TS|blue||3}} Doll Relics}} == Dialogue ==
You enter a hidden room... It's packed with an array of dolls. Each are unique, their expressions ranging from {{TS|green||joy}} to {{TS|purple||sorrow}}, their attire spanning centuries and realms beyond your own. A {{TS|blue|up|chorus of whispers}} grows louder and louder until {{TS|red|shake|the dolls are shouting}} over each other and calling for you... You must choose one and leave immediately.
{{Frame|Pick at Random}}
{{Frame|Take Some Time}}
Amid the shouting, you quickly examine the dolls. One of these two may be good? It's hard to concentrate through the {{TS|red||mental anguish}}.
{{Frame|Examine Each and Make the Best Choice}}
A warm voice happily fills your head. {{TS|orange|up|"We are going to uncover the most delightful stories together!"}}
[[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]] [[Category:ToUpdate]]
